original_statement: who was ambassador after jeanette w. hyde?
mutated_statement: who was ambassador after the predecessor appointed after them?
mutation_analysis: Named-entity replacement + Pronoun introduction/ambiguous coreference + Semantic obfuscation: proper name "jeanette w. hyde" → vague NP "the predecessor appointed after them" | no pronoun → "them" (introduces unresolved reference) | clear successor query → ambiguous/self‑referential query reducing answerability (who was ambassador after jeanette w. hyde? → who was ambassador after the predecessor appointed after them?)
